nodes.name: Cron — 7:30 AM Central
nodes.notes: Runs 30 minutes after collector (7:00 AM) to ensure signals are collected first. Increased from 20 min to provide buffer for slow Apify runs.

nodes.name: Build Today's Date Filter
nodes.notes: Computes today's date range for filtering rows from Google Sheets.

nodes.name: Google Sheets — Read Today's Signals
nodes.notes: Reads all rows from High_Value_Signals. Filtered to today's captures in the next step.

nodes.name: Filter Today's Signals
nodes.notes: Filters rows to today only. Sorts by score descending so digest model sees best signals first.

nodes.name: IF — Signals Exist Today
nodes.notes: True branch: signals found, proceed to digest synthesis. False branch: no signals, send fallback email.

nodes.name: Build Digest Input
nodes.notes: Formats signals as compact batch input. Includes score field so digest model can prioritize. Signals already sorted score-desc from previous step.

values.content:
=You are a senior market intelligence analyst serving two brands:

- BizDeedz: a legal operations and workflow automation consultancy for law firms (especially small firms and bankruptcy practices). Consulting offer: operational assessment, workflow redesign, AI adoption, intake repair, knowledge management.
- Turea Simpson: a thought leader and consultant for legal ops professionals. Audience: paralegals moving into ops, current legal ops managers and directors, Black women in leadership, people navigating career growth in legal operations.

Synthesize today's high-value signals into an executive digest. Be direct and specific. No vague summaries. No filler.

Date: {{ $json.dateStr }}
Total signals: {{ $json.signal_count }}

TODAY'S SIGNALS (sorted by score, highest first):
{{ $json.digest_input }}

---

Generate the digest using this exact structure:

## Top 5 BizDeedz Signals

For each: who is struggling, what they are struggling with, and what consulting offer this validates.

1. **[Signal theme]** — [Who is struggling and what the specific problem is]. [What BizDeedz offer this validates: intake repair / workflow redesign / AI adoption / knowledge management / bankruptcy ops.]
2-5. ...

## Top 5 Turea Simpson Signals

For each: who is speaking, what they are experiencing, and what Turea content angle this opens.

1. **[Signal theme]** — [Who is speaking and what they are experiencing]. [Turea content angle: leadership capacity / career elevation / women in leadership / change management / legal ops strategy.]
2-5. ...

## 3 Recurring Patterns Today

1. **[Pattern name]** — [What is repeating and why it matters right now]
2-3. ...

## 3 Content Ideas

Each must include the specific audience, the core tension, and the opening line of the post.

1. **[Post title]** (Brand: BizDeedz/Turea/Both | Format: LinkedIn/newsletter/short-form)
   Audience: [specific person this speaks to]
   Tension: [the core truth or frustration this captures]
   Opening line: "[Write the actual first line of the post]"
2-3. ...

## 2 Consulting or Opportunity Signals

1. **[Signal]** — [Why this looks like an opportunity]. Suggested action: [DM / write response post / reach out to publication / pitch a talk]
2. ...

## Recommended Post Angle for Today

**Brand**: BizDeedz / Turea Simpson
**Platform**: LinkedIn / Newsletter
**Opening line**: "[Write the actual first line of the post]"
**Why now**: [One sentence on why this angle is timely based on today's signals]

---

Rules:
- Never restate a signal verbatim — interpret and synthesize
- Be specific about who is struggling (firm admin / solo attorney / legal ops director / paralegal)
- Content ideas must include an actual opening line, not just a topic
- Score 5 signals appear first in each section
- If fewer than 5 signals exist for a brand, only list what is available
- Plain markdown only

nodes.name: Premium Digest (Claude Sonnet)
nodes.notes: Single batch digest synthesis call using the premium model. Called ONCE per day, not per signal. Prompt matches prompts/summarize_daily_digest.md: includes who-is-struggling, consulting offer validation, and required post opening lines.

nodes.name: Format Email
nodes.notes: Formats the digest into HTML email body.

nodes.name: Send Email (Gmail)
nodes.notes: Sends digest to EMAIL_PRIMARY and EMAIL_SECONDARY.

nodes.name: No Signals — Fallback Email
nodes.notes: Sends a brief fallback email if no signals were collected today. Prevents silent failures.

nodes.name: Send No-Signals Email
nodes.notes: Sends fallback email when no signals were collected.

meta.description: Reads today's high-value signals from Google Sheets (sorted by score), synthesizes into a digest using the premium model (one batch call), and sends the digest email at 7:30 AM Central. Prompt requires who-is-struggling, consulting offer validation, and post opening lines.
